title: helenium crithmoides
intro: Helenium crithmoides, also known as Sea Hollies or False Sea Holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Helenium crithmoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional remedies for its supposed ability to treat eye and ear problems.
